The Space

A quiet retreat in the
heart of Belgrade

Bright and modern apartment in a quiet residential neighborhood, perfect for exploring Belgrade at your own pace. The spacious living room offers natural light, a comfortable sofa bed, smart TV, and a dining table that doubles as a workspace.

The bedroom features a double bed (140 cm) with full privacy. Air conditioning ensures comfort year-round. Fully equipped kitchen with oven, fridge, and kettle. An ideal base for first-time visitors and returning travelers alike.

Smoking is not permitted inside — guests are welcome to use the balcony.

Questions

Frequently asked

Check-in is fully self-service via a lockbox at the building entrance. You'll receive detailed instructions 24 hours before your arrival. You can check in at any time, day or night — no need to coordinate with the host.
Yes, free street parking is available directly in front of the building on Višnjička street. No permit is needed. Parking is generally easy to find in this quiet residential neighborhood.
Absolutely. The apartment has a 300/30 Mbps fiber WiFi connection and a dining table that works well as a desk. The neighborhood is quiet and the living room gets plenty of natural light during the day.
The apartment comfortably fits up to 4 guests. The bedroom has a 140 cm double bed, and the living room has a sofa bed for 2 additional guests.
Smoking is not permitted inside the apartment. Guests are welcome to smoke on the balcony.
Please contact the host before booking if you're traveling with a pet. We'll do our best to accommodate your request.
A flexible cancellation policy is available — free cancellation up to 3 days before check-in. Non-refundable rates offer a 15% discount. Check the platform at time of booking for full details.
The apartment is about 30 minutes from Belgrade Nikola Tesla Airport by car. We recommend using a taxi or ride-share app (Yandex Go or CarGo are popular in Belgrade). Public transport is also available.
Yes, the building has an elevator. The apartment is on the 2nd floor and is also easily accessible via stairs.
The bus stop is 100 meters away — 15 minutes to city center. Ada Huja riverside park with cafes, go-kart, and tennis courts is very close. Big Fashion Mall is 10 minutes on foot. Skadarlija and Republic Square are 15 minutes by bus.
